results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Cyclical loss-based optimization with cyclically adjusted thresholds for sample filtering IS the multi-year cyclical reset + adaptive stage-transition gating mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Perplexity landscape predicts test loss for continual pre-training IS the perplexity-canary-gated stage transition mechanism.
Perplexity-benchmark correlation-based data selection covers canary-perplexity-based data gating.
EXACT TWIN — Curriculum learning with learning-phase checkpoint analysis IS the staged-curriculum + checkpoint-gated stage transition mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Multi-stage data mixture progression with adaptive transitions IS the seasonal-data-mixture rotation + stage-transition mechanism.
Curriculum + moderate LR-decay + model-averaging synergy covers staged-curriculum + cyclical-reset paradigm.
Multi-stage pretraining (web → quality) adopted by OLMo 2/Phi-4/LongCat-Flash covers seasonal-data-mixture rotation.
Perplexity-correlation-based pretraining data selection + benchmark gating covers canary-perplexity-gated stage progression.
